spans.quote: | Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K (≈`#ffe05c` light gold) | `#faa31b` → light gold | **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end** |
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
